name: self-improving-harness
description: EXPERIMENTAL orchestration shell that packages the v3 self-improving skeleton into slash commands + a SCOREBOARD audit trail + a fail-soft capture hook. Wraps the MINE -> DIAGNOSE -> PROPOSE one edit -> GATE (keep iff the suite score rose, else revert + archive) loop, referencing v3 eval-suite-from-git and eval-gated-evolution-loop rather than vendoring them. Fitness signal: the eval-suite score climbs round-over-round. tier: v3.
